div.p: Efficiency @ 120B ─────────────────── HERMES compact 76.9% ← HERMES verbose 53.1% MQTT v5.0 47.4% gRPC 40.0% HTTP/2 33.7% HTTP/1.1 20.1%
Keys (21B): ts, src, dst, type, msg, ttl, ack Quotes (14B): 7 × 2 around keys Separators (33B): ": " × 7 + ", " × 6 Values (29B): "2026-03-15", "state" Structure (8B): { } + value quotes
No keys: positional → schema known Epoch-day: 9570 (4B vs 10B) Type enum: 0 (1B vs 5-10B) Compact sep: no spaces Still JSON: cat + jq + grep
